penalties.description: This appears to be an instructional video demonstrating technique rather than a timed performance attempt.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement between models on whether this is a scoreable task attempt. Claude identified this as instructional content with text overlays explaining technique, while GPT-4o scored it as a completed task. Given Claude's specific observation of instructional text overlays and the absence of clear timing markers, this appears to be educational content rather than an official FLS performance attempt.

claude_value.description: This appears to be an instructional video demonstrating technique rather than a timed performance attempt.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's identification of instructional text overlays and lack of clear timing markers indicates this is educational content, not a scoreable performance attempt.
If this is instructional content rather than a timed attempt, no completion time should be recorded.
For instructional content, only clearly demonstrated phases should be counted, not a full task sequence.
Incomplete task results in zero score regardless of observed content.
